ats_utilities.checker.itype_validator module¶

Info

Defines abstract class ITypeValidator with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for validating parameters for method(s) and function(s).

class ats_utilities.checker.itype_validator.ITypeValidator[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Defines abstract class ITypeValidator with attribute(s) and method(s). Creates an interface for validating parameters for method(s) and function(s).

It defines:

attributes:

None

methods:
is_match - Compares instance type with expected type name.
is_subtype - Checks if instance is a subtype of expected type name.
get_type_name - Returns the string representation of an instance type.
_abc_impl = <_abc._abc_data object>¶
abstract get_type_name(inst: Any) → str[source]¶

Returns the string representation of an instance type.

Parameters:

inst (<Any>) – The instance to inspect

Returns:

String name of the type

Return type:

<str>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract is_match(inst: Any, expected_type_name: str) → bool[source]¶

Compares instance type with expected type name.

Parameters:

  • inst (<Any>) – The instance to check

  • expected_type_name (<str>) – The expected type name

Returns:

True if the types match, False otherwise

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError

abstract is_subtype(inst: Any, expected_type_name: str) → bool[source]¶

Checks if instance is a subtype of expected type name.

Parameters:

  • inst (<Any>) – The instance to check

  • expected_type_name (<str>) – The expected parent type name

Returns:

True if inst is a subtype, False otherwise

Return type:

<bool>

Exceptions:

NotImplementedError
